description.value:
Your body is made of fungi or plant material that would typically reproduce using spores or pollen. Your spores are infused with concentrated primal magic that can trigger dangerous allergic reactions. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Ancestral Unarmed Attack] (spore pod, 1d6 poison [range increment 20 feet, unarmed], poison weapon group) standardized ancestry feat. You become immune to the spore pods of spore-producing leshy.

Spore-producing leshies are sometimes photosynthetic.
